search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com results only. Best discovery leads are the dedicated Heroes and Laboratory pages; the beginner guide is secondary context.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Dedicated hero roster page with hero list, levels, faction filters, and gear sections. Good lead for hero discovery and hero equipment cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero names, factions, levels, and equipment leads.
claims_to_verify: Hero equipment effects and stat values

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with categories and per-level badge costs. Strong lead for research discovery, especially hero-related research grouping.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories and badge costs by level.

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Intro guide that mentions early hero use, alliances, and basic progression. Useful as supporting context but not a primary mechanics source.
results.primary_user_job: Get early-game orientation and starter hero context.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost

search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed pages matched the query within the allowed domain.

search_records.search_notes: Web search was restricted to the approved domain and returned no indexed results for this query.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching pages found on the allowed domain for the supplied search phrase.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was constrained to lastz.fandom.com. Results prioritized pages directly tied to research and hero-related events. No public-claim-ready assertions included.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycle with an 'Age of Science' phase for speeding research and a 'Hero Initiative' phase for hero upgrades; also shows reward tiers.
results.primary_user_job: Find event timing and point sources for research and hero upgrade days.

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page listing hero classes and the main hero power components.
results.primary_user_job: Identify hero roster basics and what drives hero strength.
claims_to_verify: hero role in offense and defense

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for world events, including regular daily events and special events.
results.primary_user_job: Locate event categories and navigation entry point.

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to www.packsify.com returned no indexed matches for the exact query. Consider trying a narrower path, alternate title words, or an explicit URL if available.
search_records.no_results_reason: No allowed-domain search hits found for the requested Packsify Last Z gear guide query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to mmediamreza.com and returned multiple Last Z-specific guide pages with direct gameplay progression value. Generic homepage results were ignored.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Shooter Camp; covers training cap, training speed, unlock requirements, and upgrade table. Strong fit for troop-building and progression discovery.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Shooter Camp upgrades and troop training
claims_to_verify: Training cap and speed scaling by level

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Assaulter Camp; covers training cap, training speed, and power boost milestones. Strong fit for troop-building and progression discovery.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Assaulter Camp upgrades and troop training
claims_to_verify: Training cap and speed scaling by level
Power boost milestones at higher levels

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Laboratory; covers research role, HQ dependency, and unlocking a second research queue. Good fit for tech progression cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Check research progression and Lab unlocks
